subcodes.first_line: O thou by whom the birds of the hearts have soared upon the wings of knowledge towards the threshold of Thine exalted sanctity [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اللهم یا من طارت طیور الافئده باجنحه العرفان قاصده عتبه قدسک العلیا فکلت
subcodes.subjects: @eulogies; reminiscences, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @prayer for the departed, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
